title: cassia granulata
intro: Cassia granulata, also known as Senna auriculata or Cassia auriculata, is a flowering plant in the legume family that is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural laxative and to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Cassia granulata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Cassia granulata can be prepared as a tea, powder, or capsule for herbal consumption, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
